mapper.sql: id, symbol, name, current_price, price_date, note, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM portfolio_price_snapshot WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY price_date DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id, s.symbol, s.name, s.current_price, s.price_date, s.note, s.created_at, s.updated_at FROM portfolio_price_snapshot s INNER JOIN ( SELECT symbol, MAX(price_date) AS max_date FROM portfolio_price_snapshot GROUP BY symbol ) m ON s.symbol = m.symbol AND s.price_date = m.max_date
SELECT FROM portfolio_price_snapshot ORDER BY price_date DESC, updated_at DESC
